videos.headline: Haynes King gives Georgia Tech their first touchdown
videos.description: Haynes King rushes it in to give Georgia Tech a 7-0 lead vs. Temple.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Haynes King gives Georgia Tech their first touchdown) 2025/09/20 ESHEET

videos.headline: Isiah Canion goes 37-yards for GT TD
videos.description: Isiah Canion goes 37 yards on a touchdown to give Georgia Tech a 21-0 lead.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Isiah Canion goes 37-yards for GT TD) 2025/09/20 ESHEET

videos.headline: Daylon Gordon goes 47 yards for a Georgia Tech TD
